headline: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Stock After Volatile AI Server Rally Is It Still Attractive
summary: If you are wondering whether Super Micro Computer stock still offers value after a volatile run, this article breaks down what the current price may be implying about the business. The stock last closed at US$35.46, with returns of 14.9% over the past week, a small decline of 0.3% over the past month, 14.5% year to date, a decline of 13.3% over the past year, a gain of 63.8% over three years, and a very large increase over five years. headline: FormFactor (FORM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of semiconductor testing company FormFactor (NASDAQ:FORM) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index hit a fresh record high even as the broader Nasdaq slipped as NVIDIA unveiled its next-generation Vera Rubin platform at the ISC High Performance 2026 conference in Hamburg, which set off a chain reaction across the chip and AI-server supply chain.

headline: Supermicro (SMCI) Joins Nvidia Vera Rubin Launch With Liquid Cooled AI Racks
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has been named a global system builder and launch partner for NVIDIA’s new Vera Rubin NVL4 AI platform. The company unveiled next generation, liquid cooled data center rack solutions aimed at large scale AI and scientific workloads. This announcement highlights Super Micro’s role in supplying infrastructure for the Vera Rubin ecosystem, alongside NVIDIA and Dell.
